name_en: Factory-grade Small Dior Jolie Bucket Bag "White"
name_cn:
Factory-grade Small Dior Jolie Bucket Bag "White"
This Dior Jolie Bucket Bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Fall/Winter Collection, showcasing a fashionable look. Crafted from black calfskin, it features a large Monogram quilting and a drawstring closure with a spacious interior. The small size is stylish and modern, designed with a detachable black leather top handle, and a detachable adjustable chain shoulder strap made of vintage gold-finish metal CD links accented with resin beads, allowing for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Drawstring closure
Interior slip pocket
Detachable leather top handle
Vintage gold-finish metal CD link chain with resin beads and adjustable leather strap
Dimensions: 17 x 16 x 9 cm (L x H x W)
